sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Siligmueller & Norvid Wealth Advisors LLC Purchases Shares of 12,436 AbbVie Inc. $ABBV

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon: Quiet Winner in a Higher?for?Longer World?
feed.summary: Bank of New York Mellon (BK) is presented as a strong beneficiary of higher-for-longer interest rates and resilient capital markets, yet it trades at a discount to its peers. The article highlights BK's business model focused on custody and securities services, generating fee income and interest on client assets, making it less vulnerable to consumer credit cycles. It suggests that while not a high-growth stock, BK offers durable cash flows, dividends, and steady returns for long-horizon US investors seeking a stable financial utility.

feed.title: FRMI DEADLINE ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Fermi (FRMI) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on March 6, 2026 – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of the March 6, 2026, deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a securities class action lawsuit against Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI). The lawsuit alleges that Fermi made misleading statements regarding its Project Matador campus, specifically overstating tenant demand and failing to disclose the significant reliance on and subsequent termination of a key tenant's funding commitment. This led to a substantial drop in Fermi's stock price, impacting investors who purchased shares during the Class Period between October 1, 2025, and December 11, 2025.
